                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    modules\scenarios\importers\__init__.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      modules\scenarios\importers\random_table_text_parser.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Utilities for importing random tables from plain text definitions.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • parse_random_table_text(raw_text: str) – Parse raw text rows into random table entries. Supported line patterns are intentionally permissive so common table formats work out of the box (e.g., table entries from SRD-style PDFs or blog posts). Blank lines are ignored. Examples of accepted formats: - ``1-3 Result text`` - ``04–06: Result text`` (supports en dash and colon separator) - ``7 Result text`` - ``12. Result text`` (period or parenthesis after the number is allowed) Parameters: raw_text (type str). Returns: List[dict].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _split_name_and_description(text: str) – Parameters: text (type str). Returns: tuple[str, str].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _parse_single_line(line: str) – Parameters: line (type str). Returns: dict.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • _build_entry(min_val: int, max_val: int, rest: str) – Parameters: min_val (type int); max_val (type int); rest (type str). Returns: dict.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class RandomTableImportError (ValueError)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Raised when a random table import string cannot be parsed.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  class WizardStep (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Base class for wizard steps with state synchronization hooks.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • load_state(self, state) – Populate widgets using the shared wizard ``state``. Parameters: state.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • save_state(self, state) – Persist widget values into the shared wizard ``state``. Parameters: state.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    modules\scenarios\scene_flow_components.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    • normalise_scene_links(scene: dict, split_to_list: Callable[[Any], list[str]]) – Return the cleaned link payload for ``scene``. The helper mirrors :meth:`ScenesPlanningStep._get_scene_links` so that the same normalisation logic can be shared with lightweight previews such as the wizard review step without duplicating behaviour. Parameters: scene (type dict); split_to_list (type Callable[[Any], list[str]]).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  modules\ui\chatbot_dialog.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Campaign chatbot dialog with rich text rendering for entity notes.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _coerce_formatting(data: Mapping[str, Any]) – Parameters: data (type Mapping[str, Any]). Returns: dict[str, list[tuple[int, int]]].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _from_rtf_json(value: Mapping[str, Any]) – Coerce a mapping that represents an RTF-JSON payload into RichTextValue. Supports common shapes found in the DB: - {"text": str, "formatting": {...}} - {"Text": str|dict, "formatting": {...}} (key casing varies) - {"Text": {"text": str, "formatting": {...}}} (nested payload) The last form appears for some Scenes rows; we unwrap it so the UI displays the inner text instead of a Python dict representation. Parameters: value (type Mapping[str, Any]). Returns: RichTextValue.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _parse_structured_text(raw: str) – Best-effort parsing for structured text serialized as JSON or Python literals. Parameters: raw (type str). Returns: Any | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _apply_line_prefix(value: RichTextValue, first_prefix: str, later_prefix: str | None=None) – Parameters: value (type RichTextValue); first_prefix (type str); later_prefix (type str | None, default None). Returns: RichTextValue.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • get_default_chatbot_wrappers() – Returns: dict[str, GenericModelWrapper].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _normalize_value(value: Any) – Parameters: value (type Any). Returns: RichTextValue | None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _normalize_excerpt_source(text: str) – Normalize extracted text before searching for snippets. Parameters: text (type str). Returns: str.

Returns: tuple[str, bool, bool].
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  • _extract_paragraph_snippet(text: str, match_index: int, query_lower: str, *, max_chars: int=2000, fallback_window: int=240) – Parameters: text (type str); match_index (type int); query_lower (type str); max_chars (keyword-only, type int, default 2000); fallback_window (keyword-only, type int, default 240).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     modules\ui\icon_dropdown.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      class IconDropdown (ctk.CTkFrame)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Compact dropdown that shows a grid of icon-only actions in a vertical list. Each option is represented by an icon and callback. The widget keeps the menu persistent (hidden when not in use) so callers can still access the underlying buttons for state updates.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      • __init__(self, parent, items, default_key=None, button_size=(32, 32)) – Parameters: parent; items; default_key (default None); button_size (default (32, 32)).

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      modules\ui\image_browser_dialog.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Dialog window that launches a webview for browsing free image libraries.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        class ImageBrowserDialog (ctk.CTkToplevel)

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Display an optional dialog that launches a webview for free image search.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        modules\ui\video_background.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Video background rendering for map canvases. Decodes video frames with PyAV and updates the map's base image layer on the GM canvas, fullscreen canvas (if present), and exposes the latest frame for web rendering.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • is_video_path(path: str) – Parameters: path (type str). Returns: bool.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        • _calc_frame_delay_ms(stream) – Return a sensible per-frame delay for the video stream. Prefer the container's reported average frame rate; fall back to other hints. Clamp to a practical range to avoid extremely slow playback from bad metadata. Parameters: stream. Returns: int.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        class _StreamInfo

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          class CanvasVideoBackgroundPlayer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Decode frames and paint them on the controller's canvases. Controller is expected to be an instance of DisplayMapController (or a compatible type) that has attributes: parent, canvas, base_id, base_tk, pan_x, pan_y, zoom, fs_canvas, fs_base_id, fs_base_tk, and a `_video_current_frame_pil` for web rendering.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • __init__(self, controller, path: str, *, loop: bool=True) – Parameters: controller; path (type str); loop (keyword-only, type bool, default True). Returns: None.
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • size(self) – Returns: tuple[int, int].

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          modules\ui\video_player.py

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Utility helpers for displaying videos on the secondary monitor.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          Functions

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          • play_video_on_second_screen(video_path: str, title: str | None=None) – Play the provided video on the secondary monitor. Parameters ---------- video_path: Absolute filesystem path to the video file to display. title: Optional window title to show while the video is playing. Parameters: video_path (type str); title (type str | None, default None). Returns: ctk.CTkToplevel.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          class _MonitorBounds

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            class _SecondScreenVideoPlayer

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • __init__(self, parent, *, root_app=None) – Parameters: parent; root_app (keyword-only, default None).
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            • _dispatch_to_ui_thread(self, func: Callable[[], Any]) – Ensure operations touching Tk widgets run on the UI thread. Remote whiteboard edits arrive on the Flask server thread; directly invoking Tk calls from there can crash the interpreter. We marshal the work back to the UI thread and block until completion to preserve the request/response flow. Parameters: func (type Callable[[], Any]).
